title: Planning
noActivePlan: You don't have an active plan
muscle_group_explanation: Set the relative importance of each muscle group. The algorithm will distribute training volume accordingly.
muscle_group_helper: Choose 'High' for focus areas, 'Medium' for maintenance, 'Low' for light work, or disable groups you want to skip.
ai_decides_muscles: Let the algorithm organize muscle priorities
ai_decides_muscles_desc: The algorithm will automatically balance muscle group distribution based on your plan and profile.
select_exercises_desc: Pick exercises for each muscle group, or let the algorithm choose.
auto_select_all_desc: The algorithm will pick varied exercises from your filtered catalog.
min_one_exercise: Select at least 1 exercise per group
algorithm_distributes: The algorithm will distribute training volume proportionally.
delete_preset_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this plan?
week_progression_table_long_desc: Load progression: percentage increase of volume/intensity vs. previous week. Negative values = deload week for recovery.
start_now_help: Start training with the plan's recommended configuration.
error_missing_exercises: Cannot save: {{count}} exercise(s) no longer exist in the catalog ({{ids}}). Remove or replace them.
next_disabled_empty_templates: Add at least one exercise to A, B, C and D before continuing.
days_per_week_locked: This preset has {{count}} fixed templates; days per week is tied to that value.
incompatible_days_tooltip: This preset needs {{count}} days per week. Extend your training days in Settings to use it.
preset_unsaved_changes_body: You have unsaved changes to this plan. Keep editing or discard?
min_templates_warning: You must keep at least 1 template
weeks_per_cycle_hint: The last week is always a deload week
weeks_per_cycle_only_deload: This cycle contains only the deload week

faithful.exercises_desc: Review and adjust the plan's exercises. You can modify sets, reps, rest or swap exercises.

presets.corredor_general_desc: Strength for runners: glutes, quads, hamstrings, calves and core
presets.pujada_desc: Uphill-specific training: glutes, quads, hip flexors and core
presets.rehab_tendinitis_anserina_desc: Pes anserine tendinitis rehab: hamstrings, adductors, quads and mobility
presets.forca_general_desc: Balanced strength: lower body, upper body, core and mobility
presets.mobilitat_prevencio_desc: Hip, thoracic, ankle mobility, stability and fascia work

llm.title: LLM Assistant
llm.use_llm_desc: Generate the plan with your own LLM (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini...)
llm.step_5: Paste the prompt and attach the CSV
llm.step_7: Paste it below and click Validate
llm.personal_notes_placeholder: e.g. "I have a weak left knee, prefer unilateral exercises for quads"
llm.error_invalid_json: Invalid JSON. Make sure to copy the LLM's response exactly.
llm.error_invalid_session: Session {{index}}: invalid or missing fields (weekNumber, dayOfWeek, durationMinutes, exercises).
llm.error_invalid_exercise: Exercise {{index}} in session {{session}}: invalid fields (sets, reps, restSeconds).
llm.error_unknown_exercise: Exercise "{{exerciseId}}" not found in catalog. Use only IDs from the CSV.
llm.error_invalid_weight: Invalid weight for "{{exerciseId}}": must be a positive number.
llm.error_invalid_rpe: Invalid RPE for "{{exerciseId}}": must be between 1 and 10.
llm.warn_duration_mismatch: Session {{session}}: estimated {{estimated}} min vs target {{target}} min.
llm.warn_weeks_mismatch: "durationWeeks" doesn't match the number of weeks in sessions.

banda_elastica_cos_complet_v1.name: Resistance band — Full body
banda_elastica_cos_complet_v1.description: Full-body resistance band program. No weights required. 2 sessions/week. Suitable for home, travel, or as an introduction to structured resistance training.

banda_elastica_forca_progressiva_v1.name: Resistance band — Progressive strength
banda_elastica_forca_progressiva_v1.description: Progressive band strength program. 3 sessions/week, undulating periodization. For athletes who travel or prefer equipment-free training.

corredor_trail_excentric_baixades_v1.name: Trail — Eccentric strength for descents
corredor_trail_excentric_baixades_v1.description: Eccentric strength block for trail runners targeting downhill capacity. 3 sessions/week, 8–10 weeks. Focuses on eccentric quad/hamstring/calf strength for descents.

corredor_trail_pujada_forca_v1.name: Trail — Uphill strength
corredor_trail_pujada_forca_v1.description: Strength block for trail runners targeting uphill capacity. 3 sessions/week, undulating periodization. Develops hip extension power and single-leg stability.

embaras_1r_trimestre_v1.name: Pregnancy — 1st trimester (conservative)
embaras_1r_trimestre_v1.description: Generator-mode conservative block for the first trimester. Prioritizes pelvic stability, hip mobility and gentle core. Always consult a healthcare professional.

embaras_2n_trimestre_v1.name: Pregnancy — 2nd trimester (moderate strength)
embaras_2n_trimestre_v1.description: Faithful-mode moderate strength block for the second trimester: glutes, stabilizers and upper body. Conservative progression. Always consult a healthcare professional.

embaras_3r_trimestre_v1.name: Pregnancy — 3rd trimester (gentle maintenance)
embaras_3r_trimestre_v1.description: Very gentle generator-mode maintenance block for the third trimester: mobility, hip stabilizers and low-impact core. Consult a midwife or physiotherapist.

gent_gran_equilibri_mobilitat_v1.name: Seniors — Balance & mobility
gent_gran_equilibri_mobilitat_v1.description: Balance and mobility block for adults 60+. 2 sessions/week of 20 minutes. Combines proprioception exercises with dynamic range of motion work.

gent_gran_forca_manteniment_v1.name: Seniors — Strength & muscle maintenance
gent_gran_forca_manteniment_v1.description: Muscle maintenance block for adults 60+. 3 sessions/week with body-weight and band exercises. May help counter sarcopenia with consistent practice.

gent_gran_funcional_v1.name: Seniors — Functionality & balance
gent_gran_funcional_v1.description: Functional strength block for adults 60+. 2 sessions/week of 20–25 minutes focusing on daily-life movements: sit-to-stand, balance, step-ups, posture.

mobilitat_toracica_espatlles_v1.name: Thoracic spine & shoulder mobility
mobilitat_toracica_espatlles_v1.description: Faithful-mode thoracic and shoulder mobility routine inspired by yoga/pilates. 2 sessions/week of 15–20 minutes. Addresses anterior chain tightness common in sedentary or desk-work populations.

mobilitat_tren_inferior_v1.name: Hip & lower body mobility
mobilitat_tren_inferior_v1.description: Generator-mode lower body mobility routine targeting hip flexors, external rotators, hamstrings and ankle. Suitable post-run or as a standalone 20-minute session.

postpart_corredora_general_v1.name: Postpartum — General runner (strength base)
postpart_corredora_general_v1.description: A 6–12 week block for postpartum runners: rebuilds lower-body strength, core stability and running-specific resilience. Medical clearance required.

postpart_generator_core_strength_v1.name: Postpartum — Generator: core → strength
postpart_generator_core_strength_v1.description: Generator-mode preset prioritizing pelvic stability, glutes and hip stabilizers; the engine will select suitable exercises from your catalog.

postpart_rehab_conservative_v1.name: Postpartum — Gentle rehab
postpart_rehab_conservative_v1.description: A cautious 4–6 week block focused on pelvic stability, core re-education and mobility. Consult a healthcare professional before starting.

postpart_retorn_trail_v1.name: Postpartum — Return to trail (progressive)
postpart_retorn_trail_v1.description: An 8–12 week block bridging postpartum strength to trail-specific demands: eccentric control on descents, reactive stability and hip power. Full medical clearance required.

postpart_return_strength_v1.name: Postpartum — Return to strength (progressive)
postpart_return_strength_v1.description: Progressive 6–12 week block to rebuild hip and core strength and stability. Increase load conservatively.

postpart_return_to_running_v1.name: Postpartum — Return to running (progressive)
postpart_return_to_running_v1.description: An 8–12 week block combining strength, stability and cautious plyometrics to prepare for return to running. Seek medical clearance and progress conservatively.

principianta_descoberta_v1.name: Beginner — Movement discovery
principianta_descoberta_v1.description: Generator-mode introductory block for women with no prior training history. Very conservative distribution, mobility and stability emphasis. Ideal as a first 4–6 week program.

principianta_forca_base_v1.name: Beginner — Foundation strength
principianta_forca_base_v1.description: Faithful-mode foundational strength block for beginners. 2 sessions/week, basic body-weight or light resistance exercises. Prioritizes technique and movement pattern learning.

principianta_forca_progressiva_v1.name: Beginner — Progressive strength (stage 2)
principianta_forca_progressiva_v1.description: Faithful-mode progression block for women who have completed a foundations block. 3 sessions/week with light dumbbells, undulating periodization. Recommended after 6+ weeks of the introductory block.

rutina_mobilitat_global_v1.name: Global mobility routine
rutina_mobilitat_global_v1.description: Faithful-mode full-body mobility routine for any level. 3 sessions/week of 20 minutes alternating lower body, upper body, and integrated mobility.

tsp_descent_eccentric_linear_04.name: Downhill Control and Knee Health
tsp_descent_eccentric_linear_04.description: Block centered on eccentric work to protect the patellar tendon and improve braking capacity.

tsp_hybrid_all_terrain_undulating_05.name: All-Terrain Performance: Hybrid Athlete
tsp_hybrid_all_terrain_undulating_05.description: Complete program that combines running-specific leg strength with meaningful upper-body conditioning.

tsp_lumbar_resilience_linear_06.name: Lumbar Resilience and Pelvic Stability
tsp_lumbar_resilience_linear_06.description: Preventive and rehab-focused block for runners with low-back history or posterior-chain weakness.

tsp_road_foundation_linear_01.name: Road Foundation: Base Strength
tsp_road_foundation_linear_01.description: Introductory block for road runners who want a solid strength base and injury prevention.

tsp_trail_stability_undulating_02.name: Technical Trail: Hip and Core Stability
tsp_trail_stability_undulating_02.description: Focused on improving motor control and the stability needed for uneven terrain and technical descents.

tsp_vertical_power_block_03.name: Vertical Power: Uphill Specialist
tsp_vertical_power_block_03.description: Designed for runners who want to improve performance on steep climbs (Vertical Kilometer).

zero_descoberta_v1.name: Zero — Movement discovery
zero_descoberta_v1.description: Generator-mode preset for people who have never exercised. Very conservative, focused on learning to move correctly. Recommended for the first 4 weeks.

zero_fonaments_setmana01_04_v1.name: Zero → Foundations (Weeks 1–4)
zero_fonaments_setmana01_04_v1.description: Faithful-mode block for absolute beginners. 2 sessions/week of 15–20 minutes using basic body-weight exercises. Prioritizes learning movement patterns over intensity.

zero_progressio_setmana05_10_v1.name: Zero → Progression (Weeks 5–10)
zero_progressio_setmana05_10_v1.description: Second block for people who have completed the initial 4 weeks. 2–3 sessions/week of 20–25 minutes. Introduces basic compound exercises with very light load.
